overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunlit urban commercial street resembling Sunset Boulevard. The scene features golden hour lighting, moderate traffic, pedestrians, and a mix of modern storefronts and historic architecture. The character walks steadily along the sidewalk, crosses one intersection, and continues past various shops and billboards.

tall distinctive art deco style building visible in the distance down the street
large digital billboard structure visible above the street
tall palm tree visible against the sky on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the left and a multi-lane road with moderate traffic on the right. The historic art deco tower dominates the distant skyline while palm trees and billboards line the street. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial restaurant row with outdoor seating

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
finishes crossing street and transitions to opposite sidewalk near Sunset Plaza

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor restaurant seating, then crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while traffic waits

entered.detail: restaurant with blue awning and outdoor seating area with stone pillars

bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a busy restaurant area with outdoor seating and groups of pedestrians gathered outside. After passing the taco restaurant, the character crosses the street at a crosswalk, navigating around a yellow fire hydrant, and reaches the opposite sidewalk near the Sunset Plaza sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: Sunset Plaza commercial strip with storefronts and billboards

segments.scene_description: Walking along the Sunset Plaza commercial strip, the character passes by buildings with red awnings and large billboards overhead, including one for 'Dead to Me.' The character continues past the Netflix building with its distinctive signage and navigates around a green dumpster on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching intersection with traffic signals

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past closed storefronts and trash bins, approaching a traffic intersection

entered.detail: traffic light pole with signals visible at the upcoming intersection
large truck with recycling symbol on the side, visible on the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Netflix building and continues along the sidewalk lined with closed storefronts and green dumpsters. The street opens up toward an upcoming intersection with visible traffic signals, while palm trees and additional commercial buildings line the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit urban commercial strip that transitions from a historic boulevard into a modern plaza area. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete wall and palm trees, with a historic art deco tower looming in the distant skyline. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a bustling restaurant district with outdoor seating before the camera follows them across a street intersection and past a yellow fire hydrant. The environment then opens into the Sunset Plaza commercial strip, passing under large billboards and red awnings toward the distinctive signage of the Netflix building. Finally, the camera continues past a series of closed storefronts and green dumpsters as the street expands toward a distant intersection under the golden hour light.
